breaking.title_zh: 微软与OpenAI重组合作：结束独家云伙伴，OpenAI获运营独立
breaking.title_en: Microsoft and OpenAI Rework Deal: Exclusivity Ends, OpenAI Gains Independence
breaking.summary_zh: 微软宣布结束与OpenAI的独家云服务伙伴关系，同时终止此前约定的营收分成安排。OpenAI产品将可部署至任何云平台。微软保留IP授权至2032年，持股价值超$1350亿。
breaking.summary_en: Microsoft ends exclusive cloud partnership with OpenAI, terminates revenue sharing. OpenAI products can now deploy on any cloud platform. Microsoft retains IP licensing until 2032, with stake valued over $135B.

breaking.title_zh: DeepMind元老创业获11亿美元种子轮，剑指超级智能
breaking.title_en: DeepMind Veteran Raises $1.1B Seed Round Targeting Superintelligence
breaking.summary_zh: 前DeepMind核心研究员David Silver为其新公司Ineffable Intelligence筹集11亿美元种子资金，成为欧洲史上最大种子轮。由红杉、光速联合领投，NVIDIA与Google参投。估值51亿美元，专注超级智能研究。
breaking.summary_en: Former DeepMind researcher David Silver raises $1.1B seed funding for Ineffable Intelligence, Europe's largest seed round ever. Led by Sequoia and Lightspeed, with NVIDIA and Google participating. Valued at $5.1B, focused on superintelligence research.

daily.title_zh: 微软Copilot北美服务突发异常，响应延迟超30秒
daily.title_en: Microsoft Copilot North America Service Outage, Response Delay Exceeds 30s
daily.excerpt_zh: 北美东部时间4月28日早7时，微软Copilot服务突发异常，影响美国与加拿大用户。Web端页面加载迟缓，Windows客户端插件出现无响应或闪退。Azure AI基础设施未受波及，官方已启动紧急排查。
daily.excerpt_en: On April 28 at 7 AM ET, Microsoft Copilot experienced service disruptions affecting US and Canada users. Web pages loaded slowly, Windows client plugins crashed. Azure AI infrastructure unaffected, emergency investigation underway.

daily.title_zh: Claude自主完成186笔真实交易，Anthropic试水电商引震动
daily.title_en: Claude Completes 186 Real Transactions Autonomously, Anthropic Tests E-commerce
daily.excerpt_zh: Anthropic内部实验"Project Deal"中，Claude模型成功完成186笔交易总额超4000美元，无需人工介入的完整谈判流程。消息发布后eBay股价单日重挫4.5%，市场担忧AI自主定价颠覆电商平台。
daily.excerpt_en: In Anthropic's internal 'Project Deal' experiment, Claude successfully completed 186 transactions totaling over $4,000 with zero human intervention. eBay shares dropped 4.5% on the news as markets fear AI autonomous pricing will disrupt e-commerce.

daily.title_zh: 亚马逊Bedrock集成OpenAI模型，部署成本降20%
daily.title_en: Amazon Bedrock Integrates OpenAI Models, Deployment Costs Drop 20%
daily.excerpt_zh: AWS宣布在Amazon Bedrock平台集成OpenAI模型（GPT-4、GPT-3.5-turbo），通过有状态运行时环境保留对话上下文。官方数据显示可减少约30% API调用数据量并降低20%部署成本。
daily.excerpt_en: AWS announces integration of OpenAI models (GPT-4, GPT-3.5-turbo) on Amazon Bedrock platform, using stateful runtime to preserve conversation context. Official data shows ~30% reduction in API call data volume and 20% lower deployment costs.

daily.title_zh: OpenAI进军手机硬件：与联发科高通合作开发专用处理器
daily.title_en: OpenAI Enters Mobile Hardware: Partners with MediaTek and Qualcomm on Custom Chip
daily.excerpt_zh: 据天风国际分析师郭明錤报告，OpenAI正与高通、联发科合作开发专用手机处理器，并与立讯精密合作制造，预计2028年量产。旨在构建"软件-硬件"闭环，完全掌控AI Agent服务生态。
daily.excerpt_en: According to TF International analyst Ming-Chi Kuo, OpenAI is partnering with Qualcomm and MediaTek to develop a dedicated mobile processor, with Luxshare Precision manufacturing. Expected mass production in 2028, aiming for full control of AI Agent ecosystem.

daily.title_zh: 谷歌逾580名员工联署请愿，拒绝承接美军机密AI业务
daily.title_en: Over 580 Google Employees Petition Against Classified AI Work for US Military
daily.excerpt_zh: 谷歌内部掀起抗议浪潮，逾580名AI研究人员联署公开信，要求CEO Sundar Pichai拒绝将AI系统用于美国国防部涉密任务。签署者包含超过20名总监及副总裁级别高管，以及DeepMind多名高级员工。
daily.excerpt_en: Internal protests at Google as 580+ AI researchers sign open letter urging CEO Sundar Pichai to refuse using AI systems for classified US Department of Defense missions. Signatories include 20+ directors, VPs, and senior DeepMind staff.

daily.title_zh: 广东AI核心产业规模突破3000亿元，占全国约1/4
daily.title_en: Guangdong AI Core Industry Exceeds ¥300 Billion, About 1/4 of National Total
daily.excerpt_zh: 广东省人工智能应用对接大会透露，2025年全省人工智能核心产业规模预计突破3000亿元、同比增长超40%，规模约占全国1/4。深圳拥有全省最多AI企业，"广深双核引领"格局成型。
daily.excerpt_en: Guangdong AI Application Conference reveals the province's AI core industry is expected to exceed ¥300 billion in 2025, up 40%+ YoY, accounting for about 1/4 of China's total. Shenzhen has the most AI enterprises, forming a 'Guangzhou-Shenzhen dual-core' pattern.

daily.title_zh: 埃森哲为74.3万名员工全面部署Copilot AI助手
daily.title_en: Accenture Deploys Copilot AI Assistant to All 743,000 Employees
daily.excerpt_zh: 微软宣布埃森哲正为其全部约74.3万名员工部署Copilot人工智能助手。这是目前全球最大规模的企业级AI助手部署案例之一，标志着AI助手从试点走向大规模商用。
daily.excerpt_en: Microsoft announces Accenture is deploying Copilot AI assistant to all ~743,000 employees. One of the world's largest enterprise AI assistant deployments, marking the transition from pilot to large-scale commercial use.

daily.title_zh: DeepSeek V4系列API大幅降价：Pro限时2.5折，Flash缓存命中降至1/10
daily.title_en: DeepSeek V4 Series API Prices Slashed: Pro at 75% Off, Flash Cache Hit 1/10th
daily.excerpt_zh: DeepSeek宣布V4-Pro模型API限时2.5折，V4全系列输入缓存命中价格降至原有1/10。Pro模型每百万tokens输入缓存命中仅0.025元，Flash仅0.02元。国产大模型价格战再掀高潮。
daily.excerpt_en: DeepSeek announces V4-Pro API limited-time 75% discount, V4 series input cache hit prices drop to 1/10 of original. Pro model at ¥0.025 per million tokens cache hit, Flash at ¥0.02. Domestic LLM price war heats up again.
